title: Fat Cat
body:
## Fat Cat
A small cute pack that will replace the cat model with a chubby version.

Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads))

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1360f271fc11b783b71ce7c2e896c187422d92fe.png)
